{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323205013CA88B086BB391DD9BED1"}"},"total":915},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7265319450987037440","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"无CP 无CP 无CP
剧情连贯不拖拉，女主就是一个目标，搞钱搞钱搞钱，搞事业搞事业搞事业，我本以为他会和第1个案件的男生成为一对，当时也挺看好的感觉，但是没有成也还可以，成不成都无所谓，从一个小小的店面《卧槽大师》，然后搞事业，成为最后一个上市公司的CEO，当个甩手掌柜，每年吃红利然后去做一些好事儿，建希望学校，或者是下乡扶贫等等等等，真的格局大开，一整个就是升华了，然后结局的时候每个人都很幸福，感觉结局都很不错，我本以为女主不会和林老板在一块儿，然而他的经纪人会和李老板在一块，没有想到经纪人和小秦警官在一起了也是一个很不错的一对，这一对CP我很满意，哈哈哈哈哈
对于一些事件的受害者，没有盲目的劝他们的原谅，而是让他们自己选择下去地府告状，还是说自己报仇这个就真的很奈斯，然后他对那一对母子僵尸也蛮好的，真的很不错，然后画符的地方也没有，像我看的其他的，就是很厉害的话随手就可以画出来，这个确实是他在自己努力的画没有说画一张成一张，这个有点儿很真实的
好看搞笑哈哈哈哈哈"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691589067,"group_id":"7138094276482698280","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"多学习，少叭叭叭，关你屁事，少在那指指点点，丨丨丨","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0qx2KNrxsEaLH3ixU/3QSE=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/07bb1cca1b994e65b0df95c783c74e2c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788731&x-signature=uoqrDxed5PIk%2FfZmySuA4TkISfg%3D","user_id":"540566670545767","user_name":"脑残远离我🙃"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"540566670545767","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7138094276482698280","book_info":{"abstract":"【无CP+玄学+女强+温馨+搞笑+灵异+看相+风水】
 
我叫赵妍，因为太能吃，被师父打包送去精神病医院“潜修”了两年。
 
本以为出院能少挨点饿，结果师父先一步把自己送进了局子。
 
为了不饿死，我咬牙租下全网闻名的凶宅，干起了抓鬼、算命、看相的老本行。
只要不违法不缺德，什么活我都接，甚至还顺手抓了个杀人犯，赚了笔悬赏金。
 
这一抓就停不下来了——
我发现抓鬼赚钱，比啃馒头香多了！
 
于是，我拿到了“华夏好市民”锦旗，成了“华夏十大杰出人物”，还上了“感动华夏”。
就连法治栏目，都把我当成了常驻嘉宾，天天追着我拍抓鬼名场面。
 
我：？
行吧，
凶宅住着，鬼抓着，钱赚着，
一不小心，我成了法治栏目最火的抓鬼女天师。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oecf5b8441329b62959d3d371b025572a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"菜包子不菜","author_id":"","book_id":"7138094276482698280","book_name":"万鬼举报！这个大佬天天在抓鬼","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#484848","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1310人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7138095042396324392","read_count":"1310","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"624738"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"310","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,幻想言情,女强,无CP,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5a0fbfeb5318fdd413b940fe2f186f46~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779454214&x-signature=HraA9YiuUMDSLCWvoAGSO36%2FaLc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"6887480271","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6.2107407e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323205013CA88B086BB391DD9BED1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读61小时后点评"},"sta 本以为出院能少挨点饿，结果师父先一步把自己送进了局子。
